title: betula utilis
intro: Betula utilis, also known as the Himalayan birch, is a deciduous tree species native to the Himalayan region. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions such as fever, cough, and skin infections. The health benefits of Betula utilis include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves, bark, and roots of the tree are used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat respiratory issues, digestive problems, and skin conditions.
